description_long: This shotgun features a compact, futuristic design with a metallic silver barrel and receiver, accented by a dark wooden pistol grip. The receiver is adorned with a small digital display and control panel, suggesting advanced functionality. The barrel is rectangular and robust, with visible screws and a ribbed lower rail, possibly for attachments. The trigger is exposed beneath the receiver, and the trigger guard is minimalistic, blending into the grip. The muzzle is octagonal, giving the weapon a distinctive, modern appearance. The overall construction combines metal and wood, with a utilitarian yet high-tech aesthetic.
description: A compact, futuristic shotgun with a metallic silver barrel, digital display, and dark wooden pistol grip, featuring a robust, angular design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the metallic barrel, digital display, and wooden grip.
description_view_1: Front view focusing on the octagonal muzzle and the width of the barrel, with minimal detail of the grip visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the metallic barrel, digital display, and wooden grip from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the wooden grip and the top of the receiver, with the barrel extending forward.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, rectangular with an octagonal muzzle and no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: minimalistic, integrated with the grip, small and squared with no finger grooves or reinforcement
